benefits.description: Lost 30 lbs over 6.5 weeks with titration schedule: 1mg for 4 weeks, then 2mg for 4 weeks, then increased to 3mg
Body now craves protein-rich foods (steak, chicken, yogurt, tuna) rather than junk foods

side_effects.description: Gained 7 lbs in week 4 due to dosing error, but lost it back quickly

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg, titrated to 2mg after 4 weeks, then increased to 3mg. Initial weight approximately 400 lbs. Uses Shotsy app for tracking. Injects every 5-6 days based on hunger levels. Dosing schedule color-coded (chart referenced but not detailed).
